Applicable SOPs: Update Tracking Number/Order Status SOP (DSC2S) - VCN
Text: Hello [supplier name], Thank you for reaching out to confirm the status of this PO. I can review this order and process with you today. I have updated any tracking as appropriate for your team. I have refreshed this PO to show the current status we have on file as well for you. Your team can also manage tracking directly in Partner Home. Please refer to the detailed process for updating the PO in Dropship Orders outlined in this Help Center article: https://partners.wayfair.com/help/2/article/1252 . When the carrier scans the package, the tracking should upload automatically, provided the required shipping process is followed. Orders are only considered overdue once they generate into the Overdue Order Alerts Page. Please be sure to update the tracking information in the overdue order section on the Wayfair Partner Home as soon as possible to avoid changes to your metrics. To clear an overdue order alert please follow these steps: Partner Home > Orders > Order Alerts, search for the PO and select ‘Yes’ under ‘Order Shipped?’ > Enter the Actual Ship Date and Tracking Number and select the blue ‘Save Changes’ button at the top of the page. Please note: Picked Up (Awaiting Carrier Scan) statuses do not clear an overdue order alert - the PO must be inducted into the carriers network fully in order to clear an overdue order alert. If the PO has not shipped out please select ‘No’ under ‘Order Shipped?’ > Provide an update to if the item is in stock or not > Select a Delay Reason and Expected Ship Date then select the blue ‘Save Changes’ button at the top of the page. If you have any further questions please refer to this Help Center article: https://partners.wayfair.com/help/2/article/585 We want to make sure all your concerns are heard, so if this issue persists, please feel free to reach back out in this thread, and I will be happy to further assist. Otherwise, if I've resolved your concerns for the time being, I hope you have a great day! Help us improve by sharing your feedback. You will receive an email shortly with a survey, or you can provide feedback on any closed tickets in Partner Home. We sincerely value your partnership. Thank you,

Applicable SOPs: Update Tracking Number/Order Status SOP (DSC2S) - VCN
Text: Hello [supplier name], Thank you for reaching out regarding the status of this order. Please note there have been some recent changes in the Partner Home UI with regard to order statuses. The "Picked Up (Awaiting Carrier Scan)" indicates that the PO is currently awaiting induction to the carriers network. Please note that until a successful induction scan has passed on the order, this status, as well as any related overdue order alerts will persist - this is by design, as fulfillment completion is not indicated until the carrier confirms their possession of the item(s). The "In Transit (Carrier Scan Received)" status indicates the item has been shipped and successfully received and inducted by the carrier. This also is our indication that the vendor partner portions responsibility to the PO has been fulfilled and applicable payments will be processed according to your payment terms with Wayfair. Please note that we are unable to force through any further changes to the status in the partner portal, though a "Delivered" status is not required for invoicing to take place. Any applicable payments and deductions will be shown under the invoicing section of the portal. A response on those requests will route to the appropriate team to provide additional details. We want to make sure all your concerns are heard, so if this issue persists, please feel free to reach back out in this thread, and I will be happy to further assist. Otherwise, if I've resolved your concerns for the time being, I hope you have a great day! Help us improve by sharing your feedback. You will receive an email shortly with a survey, or you can provide feedback on any closed tickets in Partner Home. We sincerely value your partnership. Thank you,

Applicable SOPs: Update Tracking Number/Order Status SOP (DSC2S) - VCN
Text: Hi {SU Name}/Team, Thank you for reaching out about the status of this PO. As per the email shared with you on April 21st " New on Partner Home: Dropship Order Status Changes ", we’ve recently updated the Dropship Order statuses, including inducted (shipped) and non-inducted (unshipped). Overdue Order Alerts are generated for POs that have passed their Must Ship By Date without a carrier induction scan. These alerts now also apply to eligible POs in a Picked Up (Awaiting Carrier Scan) status. Submitting an ASN updates the PO to this status, but it does not confirm carrier induction. As a result, a PO may appear as "shipped" from your perspective (ASN submitted/manually marked shipped), but will still be flagged as overdue until the first carrier scan is received. To prevent overdue alerts, we recommend ensuring that shipments are handed over to the carrier and scanned on or before the Must Ship By Date. If you believe the PO has already been inducted but is still showing as overdue, please let us know and share any available tracking details so we can investigate further. Thanks again for reaching out. I am marking this ticket as complete. If you need further support with this issue, please comment to re-open. Help us improve by sharing your feedback. You will receive an email shortly with a survey, or you can provide feedback on any closed tickets in Partner Home. We sincerely value your partnership. Kind Regards,
